name: Curried Beef Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, thoroughly combine the herb-seasoned stuffing mix, evaporated milk, salt, and curry powder.
2. Add the ground beef to the bowl and blend well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Shape the mixture into 48 balls that measure approximately 1 inch in diameter.
To Microwave 12 Meatballs (on a paper plate):
1. Cover a paper plate with wax paper.
2. Microwave at high for 2-3 minutes, rotating the dish a quarter turn after 1 minute to ensure even cooking.
3. Serve with Sweet-Tart Sauce.
